parameters.query: INSERT INTO ghl_sync_state (entity, location_id, last_synced_at, records_synced, updated_at) VALUES ('conversations', $1, NULL, 0, NOW()) ON CONFLICT (entity, location_id) DO NOTHING; SELECT entity, location_id, last_synced_at, last_cursor, records_synced FROM ghl_sync_state WHERE entity = 'conversations' AND location_id = $1

={{ $json.conversations.length > 0 ? 'INSERT INTO dim_conversations (conversation_id, contact_id, location_id, channel_type, inbox_id, inbox_name, assigned_user_id, assigned_user_name, status, unread_count, last_message_at, valid_from, is_current, ghl_created_at, synced_at) SELECT r.conversation_id, r.contact_id, r.location_id, r.channel_type, r.inbox_id, r.inbox_name, r.assigned_user_id, r.assigned_user_name, r.status, r.unread_count, r.last_message_at::timestamptz, NOW(), TRUE, r.ghl_created_at::timestamptz, r.synced_at::timestamptz FROM jsonb_to_recordset($1::jsonb) AS r(conversation_id varchar, contact_id varchar, location_id varchar, channel_type varchar, inbox_id varchar, inbox_name varchar, assigned_user_id varchar, assigned_user_name varchar, status varchar, unread_count int, last_message_at text, ghl_created_at text, synced_at text) ON CONFLICT (conversation_id) WHERE is_current = TRUE DO UPDATE SET status = EXCLUDED.status, unread_count = EXCLUDED.unread_count, last_message_at = EXCLUDED.last_message_at, assigned_user_id = EXCLUDED.assigned_user_id, assigned_user_name = EXCLUDED.assigned_user_name, synced_at = EXCLUDED.synced_at' : 'SELECT 1' }}
SELECT conversation_id FROM dim_conversations WHERE location_id = $1 AND is_current = TRUE AND first_inbound_body IS NULL ORDER BY ghl_created_at DESC LIMIT 50

UPDATE dim_conversations SET first_inbound_body = $1, first_inbound_at = CASE WHEN first_inbound_at IS NULL AND $2::text IS NOT NULL THEN $2::timestamptz ELSE first_inbound_at END WHERE conversation_id = $3 AND is_current = TRUE AND first_inbound_body IS NULL
UPDATE ghl_sync_state SET last_synced_at = NOW(), last_cursor = $1, records_synced = records_synced + $2, last_error = NULL, updated_at = NOW() WHERE entity = 'conversations' AND location_id = $3
